title: MACE PVP MODPACK
description: mod pack designed for the mace style of pvp
body: this mod pack is made to make it faster to get in to the mace pvp community. the mods in this mod pack are pvp mods made to make the game easier for new people. some mods like sodium are for fps boost. what i mean by makes pvp easier is mods like bactromod for low fire fullbright smaller shield just to name a few.
